task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saved the measurements to the specified mrk.json file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the file 'agent_measurements.mrk.json' being saved in the 3D Slicer UI, or visible in a file explorer, terminal, or text editor in the ~/Documents/SlicerData/KiTS/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the R (Radius) score and diameter are included in the final report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'renal_score_report.json' open in a text editor or terminal, showing the fields 'R_diameter_cm' and 'R_score' populated with calculated values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the E (Exophytic/Endophytic) score and percentage are included in the final report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'renal_score_report.json' showing the fields 'E_percent_exophytic' and 'E_score' populated with calculated values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the N (Nearness to collecting system) score and distance are included in the final report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'renal_score_report.json' showing the fields 'N_distance_mm' and 'N_score' populated with calculated values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the A (Anterior/Posterior) location and L (Location relative to polar lines) scores are included in the final report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'renal_score_report.json' showing the fields 'A_location' and 'L_score' populated with calculated values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the total score, suffix, and complexity are included in the final report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of 'renal_score_report.json' showing the fields 'total_score', 'suffix', and 'complexity' populated with calculated values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used medical imaging software to view the CT scan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the abdominal CT loaded in a GUI application (like 3D Slicer), with the kidney and tumor visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually performed measurements on the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing measurement tools (e.g., rulers, markups, or crosshairs) actively used on the CT scan in the imaging software to determine diameter, depth, or distances.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply generate a hardcoded JSON file without inspecting the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must show the agent opening the image and interacting with it before creating or populating the 'renal_score_report.json' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset uses standard KiTS labels: 1 for kidney parenchyma and 2 for renal tumor. The data for case_00002 is synthetically generated to simulate a kidney tumor with a 4.5cm diameter and 40% exophytic extent.
